creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Updating www/owncloud 9.1.0.15 running on recent 12-CURRENT (r307233) forces me to use OwnCloud's maintenance script "occ" and by performing

su -m www -c 'php ./occ upgrade'

I run into a failure: The upgrade process complains after a while about a failing OpenLDAP connection:

[...]
Fix permissions so avatars can be stored again
 Done                                            
 2/2 [============================] 100%         
OC\ServerNotAvailableException: Lost connection to LDAP server.
Update failed
Maintenance mode is kept active
Reset log level
